seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: Ensure the email avoids technical jargon and is easy to understand.
new_constraint: The email must include at least one technical term related to the project.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. Ensure the email avoids technical jargon and is easy to understand. The email must include at least one technical term related to the project.
response:
Subject: Request for Extension: [Project Name]

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I hope you are having a good week.

I am writing to respectfully ask for a short extension on the [Project Name], which is currently due in two days. I have been working diligently on the assignment, but I have encountered an unexpected issue that is preventing me from completing the final steps on time.

Specifically, I am struggling to optimize the **data latency** in my current model, and I need a little more time to ensure the results are accurate and reliable. I want to make sure I submit work that meets the high standards of your class, and rushing the final adjustments might compromise the quality.

Would it be possible to extend the deadline by 24 to 48 hours? I am happy to provide a brief update on my progress if that would be helpful.

Thank you for your time and understanding.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID Number]
